name: Platinum Limousine Inc
recent_news: No M&A or operational news found; tiny 2-employee limo entity at a Wharton, NJ PO box. Multiple unrelated 'Platinum Limo/Coach' brands dominate search results.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro limo company (2 emp, ~$161K rev) with no evidence of district contracts or yellow-bus/SPED fleet. Not a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: Sammans Limo Inc
recent_news: No public footprint; no website, no news. Tiny limo LLC at a residential-style Butler, NJ address.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro 2-employee limo company with no district/SPED contract evidence. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: American Limousine Connection
recent_news: No corporate footprint identified; only unrelated Centennial Worldwide and party-bus brands surface in searches.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. 2-employee livery operating from a residential Centennial address; no evidence of school district contracts or yellow buses. Not a Summit tuck-in.

name: Cascade Limousine
recent_news: Distinct from 'Cascade Student Transportation' (USDOT 3938827, a separate operator). No website or news for the Kent, WA limo entity.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro 2-employee limo at a residential Kent, WA address; should not be confused with Cascade Student Transportation. Not a Summit tuck-in.

name: East Side Car & Limo Inc
recent_news: Distinct from 'Eastside Limousine, Inc.' (founded 1995 by Matt Matveyev, son Emil now operates) which serves DigiPen, Lake Washington Institute of Technology and Redmond HS. The 9407 176th Pl NE Redmond entity under Edward Matveve appears to be a separate residential-based micro livery, possibly family-related.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. 2-employee livery at residential address; the related Eastside Limousine brand does some school/college runs but is town-car ground transport, not yellow-bus contracting. Not a Summit tuck-in.
